message:
fix(guard): improve glob-to-regex ** handling and update test expectations

Fix Python glob_to_regex helper used by the conformance test harness to
correctly handle ** patterns. Previously ** was converted to .* which
matches greedily across path separators but failed at directory boundaries
when surrounded by slashes. Now ** surrounded by slashes becomes
(?:/|/.+/) (matching zero or more intermediate directories), and a
leading ** becomes (?:.+/|) (matching any prefix path or empty).

Update normalize_path test expectations to remove leading ./ and / from
inputs — the tests now reflect the actual normalization contract more
accurately.

Add rev-parse of local HEAD SHA in the net-zero push diff test to ensure
the test captures the exact commit state.

Remove a redundant comment in the reservation archive reader test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
